__comment: Copy to config.json and fill in. Secrets go in .env, not here.
__broll_style_options: pip | fullscreen — 'pip' shows speaker in corner during B-roll; 'fullscreen' covers speaker with B-roll and shows speaker full-screen during gaps (Gemini picks anchor moments)
__transcribe_provider_options: groq (free, Whisper Large v3) | elevenlabs (paid, Scribe v2 — more accurate Hebrew)
